mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO attendance( lecture_id, course_id, member_id, attend_date, `status` ) SELECT c.lecture_id, c.course_id, c.member_id, #{attendDate}, 'attend' FROM course c WHERE c.lecture_id = #{lectureId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM attendance a WHERE a.lecture_id = c.lecture_id AND a.course_id = c.course_id AND a.attend_date = #{attendDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT a.attend_date AS attendDate, m.`code` AS `code`, m.`name` AS `name`, s.academic_year AS academicYear, mj.`name` AS `major`, a.`status` AS `status`, a.reason AS reason, a.lecture_id FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.member_id = s.member_id LEFT JOIN member m ON s.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN major mj ON mj.major_id = s.major_id JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = a.lecture_id WHERE a.lecture_id = #{lectureId} AND a.attend_date = #{attendDate} ORDER BY m.`name` ASC
